docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-22-1994, DENIED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PIKE RICHARD

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIRMINGHAM ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIKE RICHARD $2,950.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,965.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,950.00 FILED BY BIRMINGHAM ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT PIKE RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PIKE RICHARD HEARING SET FOR FEB-22-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,004.93 AS TO DEFENDANT PIKE RICHARD
INVALID POS AS TO DEFEND.? NO INFORMATION RECORDED ABOUT SERVICE.
